title: lotus axilliflorus
intro: Lotus axilliflorus, also known as the lotus or Indian lotus, is a plant species belonging to the Nelumbonaceae family. It is a perennial aquatic plant with medicinal properties, primarily used to treat various health conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Lotus axilliflorus include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The herbal preparations of Lotus axilliflorus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or used topically for skin treatments.
